stages.concept:
# Unit 121: 지각동사와 사역동사의 수동태 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **지각동사와 사역동사의 수동태**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 지각동사/사역동사의 능동태에서 **원형부정사**가 수동태에서는 **to부정사**로 바뀌어요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: **지각동사 수동태**:

> I **saw** him **cross** the street. (능동 — 원형부정사)
> → He **was seen to cross** the street. (수동 — **to** cross)
> 그가 길을 건너는 것이 보여졌다.

> We **heard** her **sing** a song. (능동)
> → She **was heard to sing** a song. (수동)
> 그녀가 노래하는 것이 들렸다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **사역동사 make 수동태**:

> The teacher **made** us **study** hard. (능동)
> → We **were made to study** hard by the teacher. (수동)
> 우리는 선생님에 의해 열심히 공부하게 되었다.

**Q. 다음 능동태 문장을 수동태로 바르게 전환한 것을 고르세요.**
"Mom made me clean my room."
1. I was made clean my room by mom.
2. I was made to clean my room by mom. ✅
3. I was made cleaning my room by mom.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 아주 중요해요! 능동태 문장에서 목적격 보어로 쓰였던 원형부정사(clean)는 수동태 문장이 되면 **to부정사(to clean)**로 반드시 바뀌어야 한답니다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **let**은 수동태로 잘 쓰지 않고, **be allowed to**로 바꿔요.

> She **let** me **go** home. (능동)
> → I **was allowed to go** home. (수동)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **have**는 수동태로 사용하지 않아요.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 수동태에서 원형부정사 → to부정사로 바뀌는 게 핵심! let은 be allowed to로! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 121: 지각동사와 사역동사의 수동태 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 바꿔 쓰시오.
My mom made me clean the room.
> **정답** I was made to clean the room by my mom.

---

**02.** I saw him cross the street.
> **정답** He was seen to cross the street by me.

---

**03.** She heard him sing a song.
> **정답** He was heard to sing a song by her.

---

**04.** The teacher made us study hard.
> **정답** We were made to study hard by the teacher.

---

**05.** I watched her dance on the stage.
> **정답** She was watched to dance on the stage by me.

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I was made clean the room by my mom.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** made clean → made to clean

---

**07.** He was seen cross the street.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** seen cross → seen to cross

---

**08.** She was heard sing a song.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** heard sing → heard to sing

---

**09.** We were made study hard by the teacher.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** made study → made to study

---

**10.** He was let to go home early.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** let to go → let go (let은 수동태에서도 원형부정사)

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
나는 엄마에 의해 방을 청소하게 되었다.
I was the room by my mom.
> **정답** made to clean

---

**12.** 그는 길을 건너는 것이 목격되었다.
He was the street.
> **정답** seen to cross

---

**13.** 그녀가 노래하는 것이 들렸다.
She was a song.
> **정답** heard to sing

---

**14.** 우리는 선생님에 의해 열심히 공부하게 되었다.
We were hard by the teacher.
> **정답** made to study

---

**15.** 그는 일찍 집에 가도록 허락받았다.
He was home early.
> **정답** let go

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
나는 엄마에 의해 설거지를 하게 되었다.
was I made to wash the dishes by my mom
> **정답** I / was / made / to / wash / the / dishes / by / my / mom

---

**17.** 그가 공원에서 뛰는 것이 목격되었다.
was He seen to run in the park
> **정답** He / was / seen / to / run / in / the / park

---

**18.** 그녀가 피아노 치는 것이 들렸다.
was She heard to play the piano
> **정답** She / was / heard / to / play / the / piano

---

**19.** 우리는 조용히 하게 되었다.
were We made to be quiet
> **정답** We / were / made / to / be / quiet

---

**20.** 그는 집에 일찍 가도록 허락받았다.
was He let go home early
> **정답** He / was / let / go / home / early
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 121: 지각동사와 사역동사의 수동태 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
They watch us play tennis.
We are watched play tennis by them.
They are watched to play tennis by us.
We are watched to play tennis by them.
They are watched play tennis by us.
> **정답** We are watched to play tennis by them.

---

**02.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Tom heard her sing a song.
She was heard to sing a song by Tom.
Tom was heard singing a song by her.
She was heard sing a song by Tom.
She was heard to singing a song by Tom.
> **정답** She was heard to sing a song by Tom.

---

**03.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
She makes me print this handout.
I ___________ print this handout by her.
am made to
am made of
am made
am made for
> **정답** am made to

---

**04.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
Amy lets her dog sit down.
Her dog __________ sit down by Amy.
is allowed
is allowed to
are allowed to
is allow to
> **정답** is allowed to

---

**05.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
She saw the car hitting the guardrail.
Hitting the guardrail was seen by the car.
The car was seen hit the guardrail by her.
The car was seen hitting the guardrail by her.
The car was seen to hitting the guardrail by
her.
> **정답** The car was seen hitting the guardrail by her.

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
They saw many balloons fly into the sky.
Many balloons was seen to flying into the sky
by them.
Many balloons were seen to fly into the sky by
them.
Many balloons was seen to fly into the sky by
them.
Many balloons was seen fly into the sky by
them.
> **정답** Many balloons were seen to fly into the sky by them.

---

**07.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
We heard the captain making an announcement.
An announcement was heard to make the
captain by us.
The captain was heard made an
announcement by us.
The captain was heard making an
announcement by us.
The captain was heard to making an
announcement by us.
> **정답** The captain was heard making an announcement by
us.

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
They were seen to dance on the stage by
spectator.
I am made to play outside with friends.
He is heard to crying out by me.
They were had clean the room by me.
> **정답** I am made to play outside with friends., They were
seen to dance on the stage by spectator.

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The cat is seen chasing a mouse by them.
I am made water the garden by my father.
The man was seen to run away by the police.
The building is seen to collapse by us.
• collapse 붕괴되다
> **정답** I am made water the garden by my father.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I am made take a walk with my dog.
She is watched skating on the ice by them.
The thieves are made to raise their hands by
the police.
He was seen to be carried away by us.
> **정답** I am made take a walk with my dog.

---

**11.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
I made my son wash a car.
My son __________ a car by me.
was made to wash
was made wash
is made to wash
is made wash
> **정답** was made to wash

---

**12.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
[2개]
나는 나뭇잎이 떨어지는 것이 보였다.
The leaves ____________ by me.
are seen fall
are seen to fall
are seen falling
is seen to fall
> **정답** are seen to fall, are seen falling

---

**13.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
학생들은 교칙에 의해 교복을 입게 된다.
The students ____________ school uniforms by the
school rules.
is made wear
is made to wear
are made to wear
are made wear
> **정답** are made to wear

---

**14.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 수동태로 바르게 영작한 것을
모두 고르시오. [2개]
그는 Amy가 노래하는 것을 들었다.
Amy was heard to sing a song by him.
Amy was heard singing a song by him.
He was heard to sing a song by Amy.
He was heard sing a song by Amy.
> **정답** Amy was heard singing a song by him., Amy was
heard to sing a song by him.

---

**15.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 수동태로 바르게 영작한 것을
고르시오.
선생님은 학생들이 정시에 학교에 도착하도록 한다.
The students are made arriving at school on
time by the teacher.
The students are made arrive at school on
time by the teacher.
The teacher are made the students come to
school on time.
The students are made to arrive at school on
time by the teacher.
> **정답** The students are made to arrive at school on time by
the teacher.

---

**16.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 수동태로 바르게 영작한 것을
고르시오.
나는 안내원에 의해 방에 들어가도록 허락되었다.
I was let enter the room by the receptionist.
I was allowed to enter the room by the
receptionist.
I was allowed enter the room by the
receptionist.
I was allowed entering the room by the
receptionist.
> **정답** I was allowed to enter the room by the receptionist.

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
(과거시제로)
A bomb heard to blow up
by them.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** heard → was heard

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
(과거시제로)
We were made line up outside
the building.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** line → to line

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
(과거시제로)
Tom saw to play the guitar
by the audience.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** saw → was seen

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
Tom is a very close friend of mine. He
was heard to move abroad. He
is made leaving our school. We
are very sad and promise to meet again next
time.
> **정답** was heard, is made to leave, promise
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 121 지각동사와 사역동사의 수동태중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
My father made us wash the dog.
We  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  by
my father.
정답 were, made, to, wash, the, dog

---

**02.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
I saw a security guard getting people out.
A security guard  (     )   (     )   (     )  
 by me.
정답 was, seen, getting, people, out

---

**03.** 주어진 문장을 수동태로 고쳐 쓰시오.
He let the children play soccer here.
The children  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
 by him.
정답 were, allowed, to, play, soccer, here

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그가 창 밖으로 뛰어나가는 것이 보였다. (see, run out
of)
He ____________________________________ the
window by me.
정답 was seen to run out of (was seen running out of)

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
우리는 사서에 의해 책을 빌리도록 허가받았다. (allow,
borrow)
We __________________________________ books by
librarians.
정답 were allowed to borrow

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
They saw her open the box.
She _______________________________ the box by
them.
정답 was seen to open

---

**07.** 능동태를 수동태로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
We heard the orchestra playing a symphony.
The orchestra  (     )   (     )   (     )  a symphony by
us.
정답 was, heard, playing

---

**08.** 능동태를 수동태로 바꿀 때 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 쓰시오.
My mom makes me throw out the trash.
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  out the trash by my
mom.
정답 am, made, to, throw

---

**09.** 다음 글을 읽고 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여 대화문을
완성하시오. (수동태 사용)
see, draw
A: Did you see what she was doing yesterday?
B: She  (     )   (     )   (     )  a picture yesterday by
me.
정답 was, seen, drawing

---

**10.** 다음 글을 읽고 괄호 안의 단어를 이용하여 글을
완성하시오. (수동태 사용)
We [make] (     )  to come to school by 9 o'clock
by the teacher. And we have classes at school and go
home at 4. We [allow] (     )  to play until 7 p.m.
We play soccer in the playground] and eat dinner.
정답 are made, are allowed

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 121: 지각동사와 사역동사의 수동태 - 변형문제

**01.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
They watch us swim in the pool.
We are watched swim in the pool by them.
They are watched to swim in the pool by us.
We are watched to swim in the pool by them.
They are watched swim in the pool by us.
> 정답: We are watched to swim in the pool by them.

---

**02.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
Tom heard her play the piano.
She was heard to play the piano by Tom.
Tom was heard playing the piano by her.
She was heard play the piano by Tom.
She was heard to playing the piano by Tom.
> 정답: She was heard to play the piano by Tom.

---

**03.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
He makes me clean this table.
I ___________ clean this table by him. am made to am made of am made am made for
> 정답: am made to

---

**04.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Amy lets her cat go outside.
Her cat __________ go outside by Amy. is allowed is allowed to are allowed to is allow to
> 정답: is allowed to

---

**05.** 주어진 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르시오.
He saw the bike crashing into the fence.
Crashing into the fence was seen by the bike.
The bike was seen crash into the fence by him.
The bike was seen crashing into the fence by him.
The bike was seen to crashing into the fence by him.
> 정답: The bike was seen crashing into the fence by him.

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
They saw many kites fly into the sky.
Many kites was seen to flying into the sky by them.
Many kites were seen to fly into the sky by them.
Many kites was seen to fly into the sky by them.
Many kites was seen fly into the sky by them.
> 정답: Many kites were seen to fly into the sky by them.

---

**07.** 다음 문장을 수동태로 알맞게 바꾼 것을 고르시오.
We heard the announcer making a statement.
A statement was heard to make the announcer by us.
The announcer was heard made a statement by us.
The announcer was heard making a statement by us.
The announcer was heard to making a statement by us.
> 정답: The announcer was heard making a statement by

---

**08.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
They were seen to sing on the stage by the audience.
I am made to study in the library.
He is heard to crying out by me.
They were had clean the yard by me.
> 정답: I am made to study in the library., They were

---

**09.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The bird is seen flying over the trees by them.
I am made water the flowers by my mother.
The boy was seen to run across the street by the driver.
The bridge is seen to shake by us.
> 정답: I am made water the flowers by my mother.

---

**10.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I am made take a nap every afternoon.
She is watched dancing on the floor by them.
The prisoners are made to raise their arms by the guards.
He was seen to be pushed away by us.
> 정답: I am made take a nap every afternoon.

---

**11.** 다음 두 문장의 의미가 같도록 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I made my daughter read a book.
My daughter __________ a book by me. was made to read was made read is made to read is made read
> 정답: was made to read

---

**12.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오. [2개]
나는 눈이 내리는 것이 보였다.
The snow ____________ by me. is seen fall is seen to fall is seen falling was seen to fall
> 정답: is seen to fall, is seen falling

---

**13.** 주어진 우리말을 영작할 때 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
학생들은 규칙에 의해 교복을 입게 된다.
The students ____________ school uniforms by the rules. is made wear is made to wear are made to wear are made wear
> 정답: are made to wear

---
